name: Penghua Hong Kong Stock Through CSI Hongkong Bank Investment Index Fund(LOF)
summary: Penghua Hong Kong Stock Through CSI Hongkong Bank Investment Index Fund(LOF) is a fund managed by Penghua Fund Management that invests in Hong Kong-listed stocks through the China Stock Connect program, tracking the CSI Hong Kong Bank Investment Index. It is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), allowing it to be traded on the stock exchange.
